Frequently Asked Questions

Common inquiries from the trading frontier.

verified Is Galactic Trading available globally?

Yes, our infrastructure is distributed across decentralized nodes globally, ensuring low-latency access from any star system.

shield How secure are my assets?

We employ multi-layer cold storage and end-to-end encrypted transactions, monitored by 24/7 AI-driven sentinel systems.

speed What are the trading fees?

Galactic offers ultra-low commission rates starting at 0.01% for high-volume cosmic explorers. We prioritize transparent liquidity.

rocket_launch Can I test with demo capital?

Absolutely. Every new explorer receives 100,000 Galactic Credits in a simulated environment to perfect their flight path.

Ready to chart your course?

Join 50,000+ traders already exploring the markets with GALACTIC.
